reference_scope: aMule PartFile source lists and DeadSourceList
acceptance: PeerState distinguishes useful, queued, no-needed-parts, callback-waiting, failed, dead, retrying, no-file, and cancelled sources.

checkpoint: Add source caps and quality signals
reference_scope: aMule max source and rare-file behavior
acceptance: Source scheduling respects per-file caps, source quality, source origin, fail count, queue rank, and availability.
Dead sources expire after bounded intervals and are not re-added in tight loops.
notes: LowID dead-source timing may differ from HighID when evidence supports it.

acceptance: Peers with no useful parts stop occupying active work while remaining eligible for later source refresh.
notes: Avoid treating no-needed-parts as permanent failure.
